{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Dendropath
| introduced = lh-02-the-engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Dendropath]] is a human woman in form-fitting green with a vine motif.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c15">''The Engineer'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Dendropath]] was incapacitated by [[Karoshan]] soldiers.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c31">''The Engineer'', chapter 31</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
